{"step_by_step_thinking": "HMG-CoA synthase uses acetyl-CoA as a substrate to form HMG-CoA, which is a key step in ketone body synthesis. Malic enzyme uses malate as a substrate, not acetyl-CoA. Malonyl CoA synthetase uses acetyl-CoA to form malonyl-CoA, which is important in fatty acid synthesis. Fatty acid synthetase uses acetyl-CoA as a substrate in the elongation of fatty acids.", "answer_choice": "B"}
